events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: an unsealed weatherhead is a raintight violation (NEC 230.54) that lets water track down the service mast into the meter base/panel, risking corrosion, ground faults, and fire — so the call is **fail / high risk**, with the fix being a listed raintight weatherhead + drip loop, proper sealing at the conductor entry, and inspection of the meter base/panel for water intrusion before re-energizing.
